CALCULATOR.SUBTITLE: Operazioni fondamentali (+, ?, Â, Â). Attiva Âcalcolatrice scientificaÂ per sin, cos, ?, logaritmi, ? e altro.

CALCULATOR.FORMULA_HINT: Use x as the variable. Examples: sin(x), x^2 + 3*x, sqrt(abs(x)), exp(-x^2), log(x, 10). Trigonometry here uses radians (multiply by pi/180 for degrees). Constants: pi, e. Definite integral ??? f(x) dx uses composite Simpson?s rule (even number of subintervals). Presets labelled ?? show antiderivatives to plot. Optional purple curve: cumulative ? from x min (trapezoids on samples; second Y axis).

CALCULATOR.FORMULA_PLOT_INTEGRAL_HINT: Adds ? from x min to x using trapezoids on the same samples as the curve (second vertical axis). Restarts at 0 after gaps where f is undefined.
CALCULATOR.FORMULA_INTEGRAL_CURVE_CAPTION: Purple curve ? cumulative ? from {{xmin}} to x of ( {{expr}} ), trapezoidal rule.
CALCULATOR.FORMULA_ERR_SYNTAX: Could not parse the expression. Check parentheses and function names.
CALCULATOR.FORMULA_ERR_NONREAL: Result is not a real number at this x (complex or undefined).
CALCULATOR.FORMULA_ERR_RANGE: Invalid interval: x max must be greater than x min.
CALCULATOR.FORMULA_ERR_NOPOINTS: No points could be plotted on this interval (domain errors or non-real values).

ABOUT.JAVA_DESC: Sviluppo backend moderno di livello aziendale
ABOUT.MONGODB_DESC: Database di documenti NoSQL cloud con autenticazione
ABOUT.DISCUSSION_DESC: Discussione in tempo reale tramite WebSocket (STOMP/SockJS) con persistenza nel backend (Spring Boot).

ABOUT.STREAMING_ARCHITECTURE_DESC: Sistema di streaming ibrido con cache lato client
ABOUT.STREAMING_OVERVIEW: Il sistema utilizza un approccio ibrido: il backend trasmette TUTTI gli eventi una volta tramite Server-Sent Events (SSE), il frontend memorizza TUTTI gli eventi in memoria e visualizza solo 8 alla volta con paginazione lato client.
ABOUT.STREAMING_BACKEND_DESC: Il backend trasmette tutti gli eventi corrispondenti da MongoDB 8.2 tramite SSE, uno per uno, in tempo reale.
ABOUT.STREAMING_FRONTEND_DESC: Il frontend memorizza tutti gli eventi in memoria. Lo scorrimento utilizza dati memorizzati nella cache - NESSUNA chiamata al backend.
ABOUT.STREAMING_BENEFITS_DESC: Scorrimento veloce senza latenza di rete, visualizzazione istantanea dei prossimi 8 eventi, pronto per l'offline, ricerca/filtro istantaneo sui dati memorizzati nella cache.
ABOUT.STREAMING_APPROACH_DESC: Trasmetti una volta, memorizza tutto, paginazione lato client

EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_MONTE_CARLO_MAXFREQ_TITLE: Calibrazione Monte Carlo della frequenza massima
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_MONTE_CARLO_MAXFREQ_DESC: Confronta la frequenza massima osservata sulle palle con simulazioni uniformi senza reinserimento; p-value empirico.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_MONTE_CARLO_MAXFREQ_SUMMARY: La pallina piÂ frequente rispetto a simulazioni casuali (p-value empirico).
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_CHI2_GOF_UNIFORM_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: ?Â naÂve uniform). Scope = JSON `sinceInclusive` / `tail` / `periods` only. (1) Main balls 1?50: let n = number of draws in scope, total slots = 5n. For each k?{1,?,50}, count O_k = appearances of k across all five positions of all draws (order within a draw irrelevant). Expected E = 5n/50 each. Pearson ?Â_main = ?_k (O_k?E)Â/E with df = 49. Use PatTool pre-counts in `periods[].mf` / `chi2MainNaive` as cross-check but recompute from `tail` if you show detail. (2) Stars by FDJ era: assign each draw to period P1/P2/P3 using `periodCuts` and JSON `periods[]` starMax (9 / 11 / 12). Within period j with n_j draws and starMax S_j, pool 2n_j star-slots; counts O_s for s?{1,?,S_j}; expected E_j = 2n_j/S_j each; ?Â_stars,j = ?_s (O_s?E_j)Â/E_j with df = S_j?1. State hypotheses explicitly (uniform marginal over slots within era). Do not replace this by generic multinomial-without-replacement theory unless clearly labeled extra; primary deliverable = these ?Â statistics + df + plain interpretation.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_ENTROPY_NORMALIZED_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: normalized Shannon entropy). Scope = draws in `tail` aligned with `periods`. Natural log. (1) Mains: empirical p_k = (count of ball k in pooled 5n slots)/(5n), k=1..50. H_main = ?? p_k ln p_k (0 ln 0 = 0). H_norm_main = H_main / ln(50) ? [0,1]; equals 1 iff uniform on categories. (2) Stars per era j: categories 1..S_j, total slots 2n_j, same formula H_j; H_norm_j = H_j / ln(S_j). Report numeric H and H_norm; interpret as deviation from max-entropy baseline; optional comparison to uniform benchmark.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_GAP_RECURRENCE_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: inter-draw recurrence gaps). Index draws in chronological order as `tail` (index t=0..n?1). For each ball b?{1,?,50}, list indices T_b where b appears (?1 per draw). If |T_b|?2, gaps ?_i = T_b[i]?T_b[i?1]; mean gap ?_b = mean(?). Summarize over balls with ?2 appearances: e.g. mean of ?_b, spread (sd/min/max). Descriptive only; links to renewal/inter-arrival intuition allowed but no forecast claim. Ignore balls with <2 hits for ?_b.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_SUM_CORRELATION_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: Pearson correlation of sums). Consider draws where there are exactly five main integers in [1,50] and two star integers in [1,starMax] for that draw?s regulatory era (derive starMax from date vs `periodCuts`). Let X = sum of five mains, Y = sum of two stars. Pearson r between X and Y across all qualifying draws; report sample size n_used. State formula r = cov(X,Y)/(?_X ?_Y). No causal interpretation; mention linear association only.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_MONTE_CARLO_MAXFREQ_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: Monte Carlo calibration of max pooled frequency). From `tail`, pooled main counts over 5n slots; M_obs = max_{k=1..50} count(k). Null operational model for simulation: independent draws, each draw picks 5 distinct mains uniformly from {1,?,50} without replacement across draws? sampling mechanism is approximated by repeating n independent such draws; replicate R?800 times; each replicate yields M_sim; empirical one-sided p-value = (#(M_sim ? M_obs)+1)/(R+1). State R and that procedure; if you vary R, say so. Not a proof of bias?interpret as descriptive Monte Carlo tail probability.
EUROMILLIONS.AI_SELECTED_METHOD_HINT: **Normative methodology:** The user selected **`{{label}}`** (`{{id}}`). You MUST treat **`calculationMethodSpec`** in the JSON as the **binding operational definition** of that choice (not just the short summary). Apply it step-by-step when reasoning on `tail` / `periods`. Quick reminder: {{summary}} ? Data: all draws since `sinceInclusive` appear in `tail` (`tail.length` = `c`); aggregates in `periods`. Echo fields `calculationMethodId`, `calculationMethodLabel`, `calculationMethodSummary` only as labels; **`calculationMethodSpec` overrides ambiguity.**

EUROMILLIONS.AI_FLOW_INFO_LEAD: PatTool fills the assistant input with a ready-to-edit message: instructions for the model, a short recap of the analysis angle(s), and a compact JSON block (schema pat-eurom-ai-v2). Adjust the options below, then click the main button.
EUROMILLIONS.AI_FLOW_INFO_S1_BODY: Opens the assistant panel with that message already inserted (new conversation; nothing is sent until you press Send in the assistant). You must be signed in and have draws in the table. If the button stays disabled, check login and loading.
EUROMILLIONS.AI_FLOW_INFO_S2_BODY: Unchecked: standard scratch prompt and only one method ? the one selected with the radio on the cards. Checked: multi-method synthesis prompt and several method specs can be attached to the JSON (using the checkboxes under each card). This checkbox alone does not open the assistant.
EUROMILLIONS.AI_FLOW_INFO_S3_BODY: The radio always picks the primary angle. Its specification is copied to the JSON root fields (calculationMethodId, label, summary, spec). With several methods attached in synthesis mode, the radio still marks which one is primary for those root fields.

TV.TITLE: TV — canali gratuiti
TV.SUBTITLE: Guarda canali IPTV pubblici gratuiti in tutto il mondo (TV francese predefinita). I flussi sono inoltrati dal backend PatTool.
TV.SEARCH_WORLDWIDE_HINT: Digita almeno 2 caratteri (canale o programma) per cercare in tutti i paesi.
TV.PICK_CHANNEL: Scegli un canale per iniziare a guardare
TV.NOTE_FREE: Fonti: stream pubblici gratuiti (iptv-org). Molti canali sono intermittenti offline o geo-bloccati — è normale.
TV.ERR_PLAY: Impossibile avviare la riproduzione. Clicca play sul video o prova un altro canale.
TV.ERR_STREAM: Questo stream gratuito è offline o bloccato al momento. Prova un altro canale — molti link IPTV pubblici cadono regolarmente.
TV.ERR_MEDIA: Lo stream è partito ma la riproduzione è fallita (media non disponibile o formato incompatibile).
TV.ERR_UNSUPPORTED: Il browser non supporta la riproduzione video HLS.
TV.NO_FAVORITES: Nessun preferito ancora. Segna un canale con la stella per salvarlo qui.
TV.FAVORITES_LOGIN: Accedi per salvare e sincronizzare i tuoi canali preferiti.
TV.WORKAROUND_HINT: Riproduzione tramite il workaround ufficiale france.tv live (HLS tokenizzato).
TV.WORKAROUND_HINT_TF1: Riproduzione tramite l'API ufficiale TF1 mediainfo (account TF1 gratuito richiesto in application.properties).
TV.WORKAROUND_HINT_RADIO: Riproduzione tramite lo stream HLS ufficiale Radio France (audio).
TV.ERR_TF1_AUTH: Il live TF1 richiede un account TF1 gratuito: imposta app.tv.tf1.email e app.tv.tf1.password in application.properties, poi riavvia il backend.
TV.FLOAT_HINT: Continua a navigare in PatTool mentre questa finestra resta aperta. Trascina l'intestazione per spostare, bordi/angoli per ridimensionare.
TV.FLOAT_NEED_CHANNEL: Seleziona prima un canale, poi apri la finestra flottante.
TV.FLOAT_ACTIVE_BANNER: La TV è in riproduzione nella finestra flottante — puoi lasciare questa pagina.
TV.POPOUT_HINT: Finestra indipendente — spostala su un altro schermo. Usa PiP per far fluttuare il video fuori dal browser.
TV.POPOUT_NO_CHANNEL: Nessun canale da mostrare. Riapri dalla pagina TV.
TV.WORKAROUND_HINT_M6: M6+ ufficiale è DRM. Tentativo via mirror IPTV pubblici (spesso offline).
TV.WORKAROUND_ACTIVE_M6: Mirror IPTV M6 (DRM ufficiale non supportato)
TV.ERR_MANIFEST: Impossibile caricare il manifesto HLS del canale.
TV.ERR_SEGMENT: La playlist è caricata ma i segmenti video non sono raggiungibili.
TV.ERR_KEY: Impossibile recuperare la chiave di decifratura dello stream.
TV.ERR_TIMEOUT: Timeout nel caricamento dello stream. Riprova o cambia canale.
TV.ERR_NETWORK: Errore di rete nel caricamento dello stream. Controlla la connessione o cambia canale.
